titleStmt.title: SII 17.584: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 584. (A.R. No. 539 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple, right of entrance.

Palaeographically the inscription may be assigned to the 14th century and the details of date given, viz., Year 35, Siṁha śu. 5, Wednesday, Chittirai regularly correspond to 1342 A.D., August 7, ·44; ·30.

This seems to record a gift of land by purchase, after making it tax free, for the recitation of Vēdic hymns (adhyayana) once daily in the temple, by Tōḷāṉ Irājarāja Akaḷaṅka-ṉāḍā[ḷvāṉ] of Tiruttoṇḍīśvaram in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . komāṟupaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ [śrī]civallapate vaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5 Āvatu muppattañcāvatu [ siṁ] ha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cittirai
kkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṉperāl muppattunālāvatu varai curavittuṟaikku Iṭṭa kaṇakkupaṭi nīkki nilaikkum Irācarācan tiruviticeṅkaṭaitiruttoppu tirunantavaṉam māvaṭaikkum muppattu mūṉṟāvatu nik
paṭukaiyum kollaiyum 36 10 Āka kuḻi 2 1000 4 100 10 viḷainilam 10 3l Ik kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Orupatukkum viḷainilam patiṉṉmuvelikkum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkāciṉāl Āti
ttoṉṟum vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷc celavolaiyā vatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu vilai pa
ttoṉṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pra māṇam paṇṇi kuṭutteṉ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu tirut toṇṭicurattu toḷāṉ tiruttoṇṭicuramuṭaiyār Irācairāca
tevar kaṇṭapperumāḷ Eḻuttu: komākiḻāṉ kaṇṇuṭai vitiyāṉ vaḷattuvāḻ vittāṉ Eḻuttu komākiḻāṉ periyatevaṉ puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Inta te
tampikkātaṉ tampirān toḻap piramāyaṉ taṟkuṟiyāṉamaikku Ivai koyil mutaṟ kaṇakku tiruvāruṭaiyāṉ tevarkaṇṭa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koyil cāmatāyam puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭa nampiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koyiṟ cāmatāyam Ālālacuntaranampiye
nakarattu paśyan ceruvaṉūruṭaiyāṉ vaḷavakoṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ik koyil koyil mutaṟ kaṇakku veṭkovaṉ tiruvāruruṭaiyāṉ Avaṉiyā ḷap piṟantāṉāṉa tevan kaṇṭaveḷāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ It
Attiyayanam paṇṇumiṭattu nāḷoṉṟukku Oru canti Eṭṭupperāka Attiyayaṉam paṇṇavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Utakapūṟvataṉmatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā ka cantirātitta varaiyum cellak kuṭutteṉ tiruttoṇṭicuramuṭaiyāṉ Irāca rāca AkaḷaṅkaṉāṭāThe inscription seems to be built in at the right end.
Digital edition of SII 17.584 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
